title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - Devops
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training program for the DevOps Fundamentals course has demonstrated high levels of effectiveness, with all trainees completing the course successfully and achieving a perfect pass rate. The overall attendance rate is commendable at 96%, and the average score of 7.89 out of 10 indicates strong understanding of the material. The feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 further supports the positive reception of the course content and delivery.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully engaged all 10 trainees, resulting in a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 100%.
The average score of 7.89 suggests that while trainees performed well, there may be room for improvement to reach higher scores.

The total training hours of 216 and a scaled cost of 15 indicate a reasonable investment relative to the outcomes achieved, with an effectiveness score of 92.28 reflecting the course's overall success.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To further enhance the training effectiveness, consider implementing additional advanced modules or supplementary resources that could challenge trainees and potentially raise the average score.
Additionally, maintaining high engagement levels and exploring opportunities for mentorship roles for high-performing trainees could foster a culture of continuous learning and improvement.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
